# Floom

> Floom is infrastructure for agentic work. Point it at an OpenAPI spec and it gives you an MCP server, an HTTP endpoint, and a shareable web form — all from the same manifest, with auth, rate limits, secret injection, and run history built in.

Floom is open source (MIT) and self-hostable in a single Docker container. Hosted cloud lives at https://floom.dev.

## Key pages

- [Home](https://floom.dev/): Hero, three-surfaces pitch, and showcase apps.
- [Apps directory](https://floom.dev/apps): Every published Floom app, runnable from the browser.
- [Docs](https://floom.dev/docs): Quickstart, self-host guide, protocol reference.
- [Pricing](https://floom.dev/pricing): Free during beta, self-host free forever, paid cloud plans soon.
- [Install in Claude](https://floom.dev/install-in-claude): Add Floom to Claude Desktop, Claude Code, Cursor, or any MCP client.
- [Build a new app](https://floom.dev/build): Paste an OpenAPI URL, publish in seconds.
- [About](https://floom.dev/about): Why Floom exists, who it's for.

## Showcase apps (live, runnable)

- [Lead Scorer](https://floom.dev/p/lead-scorer): Scores a CSV of leads with Gemini, ranks and explains.
- [Competitor Analyzer](https://floom.dev/p/competitor-analyzer): Pulls positioning, pricing, and weak spots from a list of competitor URLs.
- [Resume Screener](https://floom.dev/p/resume-screener): Ranks resumes against a job description.

## Machine-readable endpoints

- **Backend OpenAPI spec**: https://floom.dev/openapi.json
- **Apps directory (JSON)**: `GET https://floom.dev/api/hub`
- **Single app metadata**: `GET https://floom.dev/api/hub/:slug`
- **Run an app over HTTP**: `POST https://floom.dev/api/:slug/run` (or `POST https://floom.dev/api/:slug/:operation` for typed operations)
- **MCP server for a single app**: `https://floom.dev/mcp/app/:slug` (SSE + HTTP)
- **Floom Protocol spec**: https://floom.dev/protocol

## Source + community

- **Repo**: https://github.com/floomhq/floom (MIT license)
- **Docker image**: https://github.com/floomhq/floom/pkgs/container/floom-monorepo
- **Discord**: https://discord.gg/8fXGXjxcRz
- **Issues**: https://github.com/floomhq/floom/issues

## Self-host (one line)

```
docker run -p 3000:3000 ghcr.io/floomhq/floom-monorepo:latest
```

Full guide: https://github.com/floomhq/floom/blob/main/docs/SELF_HOST.md
